# Fader

> Fader is a free, open-source macOS menu bar app for audio control: switch the output device with one click, connect paired Bluetooth headphones, and set a separate volume for every running app. It uses Core Audio process taps (macOS 14.4+), needs no kernel extension or virtual driver, and has no telemetry or network access.

Key facts: requires macOS 15+, Apple silicon; MIT license; install via `brew install --cask pantafive/tap/fader` or the notarized dmg.

## Links

- [Website](https://fader.pantafive.dev/): landing page with download
- [Source code](https://github.com/pantafive/fader): GitHub repository, issues, releases
- [Latest download](https://github.com/pantafive/fader/releases/latest/download/Fader.dmg): signed and notarized dmg
- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pantafive/fader/main/README.md): features, permissions model, development guide
